sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AAR Corp. enters multi-year commercial distribution agreement with Woodward
feed.summary: AAR Corp. (AIR) has secured a multi-year commercial distribution agreement with Woodward (WWD). Under this agreement, AAR will become the preferred distributor for high-demand Woodward consumable parts, such as fuel filters, gaskets, and seals, that are used in CFM LEAP, GEnx, and CF34 engines, directly supplying these to commercial airlines. This partnership expands AAR's role in the aerospace aftermarket.

feed.title: XMax Inc. (Nasdaq: XWIN) renews CEO Xiaohua Lu’s contract
feed.summary: XMax Inc. renewed the employment agreement for its CEO, Mr. Xiaohua Lu, for another one-year term beginning April 21, 2026. Under the renewed contract, Mr. Lu will receive an annual salary of $80,000 and is eligible for a discretionary annual cash bonus. This information was disclosed in a Form 8-K filing outlining material events and executive remuneration.

feed.title: This spring, Aflac encourages you to scatter seeds of kindness
feed.summary: Aflac has launched its "Scatter Seeds of Kindness" platform, inspired by their new children's book "Beyond Words," to encourage people to send uplifting messages to children facing health challenges. This initiative is part of Aflac's longstanding commitment to supporting children with pediatric cancer and blood disorders. The messages are shared with families through the Aflac Childhood Cancer Campaign and other partners, providing encouragement that goes beyond words.

feed.title: Chevron resumes full production at Wheatstone LNG after repairs for cyclone damage
feed.summary: Chevron has fully resumed production at its Wheatstone liquefied natural gas (LNG) plant in Western Australia. Repairs were completed after Tropical Cyclone Narelle damaged the facility last month, knocking both LNG processing trains offline due to damage to several hundred air-cooled heat exchangers. Domestic gas production for Western Australia was restored within a week, with LNG progressively returning to full operation.

feed.title: Synopsys and TSMC Advance AI Design Enablement Across Leading Nodes
feed.summary: Synopsys and TSMC are expanding their collaboration to advance AI-driven EDA, IP, and multiphysics design enablement across advanced semiconductor nodes and packaging technologies, including 3nm, 2nm, A16, and A14. This joint effort integrates digital, analog, and verification flows with 3D multi-die design and optical-to-electrical capabilities. The enhancements aim to improve multiphysics accuracy, accelerate development cycles for AI and high-performance computing systems, and support TSMC's 3DFabric technologies for leading-edge silicon.

feed.title: Yalla’s ESG report highlights renewable energy, AI and cybersecurity
feed.summary: Yalla Group (NYSE: YALA) published its 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Report, detailing its performance and future strategy across five pillars: responsible governance, environmental stewardship, trust, people, and community engagement. The report emphasizes expanded use of renewable energy, integration of energy-efficient technologies, deeper AI applications, progress towards carbon neutrality, strengthened cybersecurity, and diversity and inclusion efforts. The full report is available in English and Arabic on the company's investor relations website, reinforcing Yalla's commitment to sustainable development and responsible growth in the MENA region.

feed.title: Top US Bancorp Executive Makes Major Move With Fresh Stock Sale
feed.summary: Jodi L. Richard, Vice Chair of US Bancorp (USB), recently sold 40,000 shares of the company's stock for a total of $2,280,000. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates USB as an "Outperform" due to strong technical momentum and attractive valuation, despite some concerns about choppy cash-flow trends and leverage sensitivity.

feed.title: Veritone and Cold Case Foundation partner to accelerate unsolved investigations with AI
feed.summary: Veritone and the Cold Case Foundation (CCF) have partnered to use AI to accelerate unsolved violent crime investigations. The CCF is leveraging Veritone’s AI-powered Investigative Digital Evidence Management System (iDEMS) to unify disparate data, from old paper records to modern digital evidence, making it searchable and helping investigators quickly uncover new leads and connections. This collaboration aims to provide closure to victims' families by overcoming challenges posed by the massive volume of data and limited resources in cold cases.

feed.title: Virtuix Holdings (VTIX) CEO executes pre-planned sale of 137,553 shares
feed.summary: Virtuix Holdings CEO Jan Roger Goetgeluk sold 137,553 shares of Class A common stock in two transactions on April 20 and April 21, 2026, for a total of $948,872. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted before the company's direct listing. Following these sales, the CEO directly holds 4,309,689 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Appoints Dr. Charles Duncan to Board of Directors to Drive Growth and Innovation in CNS Therapies 1
feed.summary: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. has appointed Dr. Charles Duncan to its Board of Directors, effective April 22, 2026. Dr. Duncan brings over 30 years of experience in the life sciences and biotechnology sector, particularly in neurology and psychiatry, and his appointment is expected to bolster Vanda's strategic growth and innovation in CNS therapies. This move, alongside recent product approvals and a robust pipeline, positions Vanda for a new era of growth, although investors are cautioned about inherent risks.

feed.title: Viking Holdings is called a travel sector standout by Susquehanna (VIK:NYSE)
feed.summary: Susquehanna initiated coverage on Viking Holdings Ltd. (VIK) with a positive rating, highlighting it as a pure-play luxury cruise line. The firm noted Viking's defensive and growing addressable market, industry-leading return on invested capital (ROIC), and a clear path to becoming net cash positive. This positive outlook positions Viking as a standout in the travel sector.

feed.title: What to Expect From Smurfit Westrock's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock Plc (SW) is expected to report its fiscal Q1 2026 earnings on April 30, with analysts forecasting a profit of $0.55 per share, a 24.7% decrease from the prior year. Despite missing bottom-line estimates in three of the last four quarters and trailing market performance, analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating with a potential upside of 38.9%. The company's Q4 2025 results, although weaker than expected, led to a stock surge due to a strong long-term outlook for adjusted EBITDA growth and debt reduction.

feed.title: FedEx lays off more than 100 in New York, Pennsylvania
feed.summary: FedEx has laid off over 100 employees in New York and Pennsylvania as part of its Network 2.0 initiative, which aims to streamline package delivery and has already resulted in the closure of more than 200 facilities. This restructuring is part of a broader effort by FedEx to enhance efficiency across its U.S. networks.

feed.title: Weis Markets has deals on deals on deals!
feed.summary: Weis Markets is helping customers save money with new deals and rewards programs for the spring season. The "Spring It On Rewards" program allows members to earn and redeem points on specific products, while the relaunched "Grocery Rewards" offers weekly discounts. Additionally, the "Price Lock" program ensures steady prices on popular items, and "Weekly Hot Buys" highlight rotating specials.

feed.title: Ambarella (NASDAQ:AMBA) CFO John Alexander Young Sells 1,971 Shares
feed.summary: Ambarella's CFO, John Alexander Young, sold 1,971 shares of the company's stock on April 21st at an average price of $60.00, totaling $118,260. This sale, conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 plan, reduced his stake by 1.65%. The company's stock was up 2.2% at $61.28 at the time of reporting, following a quarter where it beat EPS and revenue estimates despite a negative net margin.

feed.title: Retirees Are Quietly Using These 3 Consumer Staples ETFs as a Recession Shield
feed.summary: Retirees are increasingly using Consumer Staples ETFs like State Street Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR (XLP), Vanguard Consumer Staples Index Fund ETF Shares (VDC), and Fidelity MSCI Consumer Staples Index ETF (FSTA) as a defensive measure. These ETFs feature low beta, meaning they decline less than the broader market during downturns, preserving capital due to the inelastic demand for consumer staple products. However, they significantly underperform in bull markets and should only constitute 10-20% of an equity portfolio.

feed.title: UWM Holdings CEO Mat Ishbia sells $7.52m in company stock
feed.summary: UWM Holdings CEO Mat Ishbia, through SFS Holding Corp, sold over $7.5 million in Class A Common Stock on April 21 and 22, 2026. The sales were executed via a 10b5-1 trading plan as the company's shares trade significantly down from their 52-week high, despite a notable Q4 2025 revenue beat. Ishbia still directly holds 408,131 shares, and SFS Holding Corp retains over 8.3 million shares after the transactions.

feed.title: Unisys Expands Collaboration with Salesforce to Deliver Ai-Driven Field Services
feed.summary: Unisys has expanded its collaboration with Salesforce to enhance its AI-driven field services, integrating Agentforce 360 into its Digital Workplace Solutions Field Services. This partnership leverages Salesforce's platform to optimize intelligent scheduling, automate appointments, and provide technicians with instant access to crucial information, leading to a 95% first-visit fix rate. The initiative aims to deliver speed, precision, and reliability in on-site technology support across over 120 countries, managing 7.4 million devices.

feed.title: Unilever stock consolidates as Kraft Heinz failed merger talks weigh on sentiment
feed.summary: Unilever's stock is consolidating, trading below key moving averages, following failed merger talks with Kraft Heinz regarding its food brands and ongoing labor demands from its European workforce. Technical indicators point to bearish momentum, suggesting the stock will likely trade between GBX 4,050.00 and GBX 4,350.00. Analyst Viktoras Karapetjanc notes that persistent selling, unresolved strategic moves, and union demands contribute to the negative sentiment, with GBX 4,050.00 serving as critical support for any potential bullish recovery.

feed.title: Is XPO’s (XPO) LTL Service Gains Quietly Redrawing Its Competitive Positioning Narrative?
feed.summary: XPO, Inc. is gaining recognition for its strong less-than-truckload (LTL) performance and improved service levels, helping to narrow its gap with leading competitors despite challenging freight conditions. This operational improvement supports the investment narrative around technology, margins, and network quality, ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings release on April 30. While internal forecasts project significant revenue and earnings growth, analysts remain cautious due to potential risks from prolonged freight softness and elevated labor costs.

feed.title: MDJM LTD (UOKA) OKs major share capital hike and future consolidation plan
feed.summary: MDJM LTD shareholders have approved a significant increase in the company's authorized share capital from US$250 million to US$4.4625 billion, allowing for the issuance of up to 5.1 billion ordinary shares. Additionally, shareholders granted the board of directors the authority to implement a share consolidation at a future date and ratio of their choosing, within a defined "Relevant Period." These resolutions passed with substantial majority, indicating strong shareholder support for increased capital structure flexibility.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: EIX to Report Financial Results Post-market on April 28
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX.US) is scheduled to release its financial results after the market closes on April 28 ET. Analysts are projecting EIX to report revenue of USD 4.13 billion and an EPS of USD 1.40 for the first quarter of 2026. Companies typically hold conference calls to discuss their financial results and operational performance with investors, analysts, and media.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) CEO Sells 306,139 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Arista Networks CEO Jayshree Ullal sold 306,139 shares of ANET stock for over $51 million on April 20th, reducing her stake by 5.47%. This sale, along with other recent large transactions, was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan. Despite the insider selling, Arista's stock increased by 2.9% after a Q1 earnings beat, and analysts largely maintain bullish ratings with an average target price near $177.83, supported by increased AI networking market assumptions.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Insider Sells 363 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Western Digital insider Cynthia Tregillis sold 363 shares of the company's stock on April 21st for a total of $136,883.67, reducing her position by 0.30%. This sale occurred under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, though some warn of stretched valuations given the stock's rapid appreciation.

feed.title: Insider Selling: TransUnion (NYSE:TRU) EVP Sells 1,983 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: TransUnion EVP Heather Russell recently sold 1,983 shares of company stock for $158,640, reducing her stake by 4.83% to 39,080 shares. This transaction occurred on April 21st under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan. Following the announcement, TransUnion's stock price declined by about 4.5% to $73.93 on heavy trading volume, despite the company having recently beaten earnings estimates and increasing its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Gartner’s US$6.31t IT Forecast Highlights Rising AI Spending Themes
feed.summary: Gartner forecasts global IT spending to reach US$6.31 trillion in 2026, with rapid growth in AI infrastructure and services as a key driver. This outlook emphasizes rising enterprise budgets focused on AI adoption, which aligns with Gartner's core business of providing research and advisory to technology buyers and vendors. While offering significant opportunities for Gartner, the increasing use of free or low-cost AI tools poses a potential risk to its subscription model.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: F5 Inc to Report Financial Results Post-market on April 28
feed.summary: F5 Inc is scheduled to release its financial results after the market closes on April 28. Analysts are anticipating an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.84, which would represent a 1.73% increase from the prior year's EPS of $2.79.

feed.title: Boost Issuer Wisdomtree S&P 500 Vix Short Term Fund : Prospectus - DOC00872196
feed.summary: This article announces the release of the prospectus for the Boost Issuer Wisdomtree S&P 500 Vix Short Term Fund (VIXL). The prospectus was received and notified on April 22, 2026, by the Central Bank of Ireland, issued by WisdomTree Multi Asset Issuer Public Limited Company. It contains details regarding the fund and its operations.

feed.title: Toronto Dominion Bank stock consolidates as new virtual card numbers launch for Visa holders
feed.summary: Toronto Dominion Bank (TD) stock is consolidating after recent digital offerings and a 17% surge in share value. Despite strong bullish technical trends, elevated RSI and other overbought indicators suggest a near-term sideways trading range between C$142.70 and C$144.80. Analyst Anton Kharitonov recommends a cautious stance, awaiting a clear breakout to confirm a new trend.

feed.title: A Look At THOR Industries (THO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: THOR Industries (THO) has experienced significant share price weakness recently, with a 31.6% decline over three months, despite a 7.1% gain in the past month. The company, which generates US$9.93 billion in revenue and US$300.41 million in net income, appears undervalued according to its P/E ratio of 14.1x compared to industry averages and an estimated fair P/E of 16.5x. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests an even deeper discount, indicating the market might be overly cautious with its valuation of $80.52 against an estimated future cash flow value of $132.76.

feed.title: Stellar Bancorp, Prosperity Bancshares announce receipt of regulatory approvals
feed.summary: Stellar Bancorp and Prosperity Bancshares announced they have received all necessary regulatory approvals for Prosperity's acquisition of Stellar. This includes waivers from the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas and approvals from the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation and the Texas Department of Banking for the merger of Stellar Bank into Prosperity Bank. The announcement clears a significant hurdle for the completion of the merger.

feed.title: Is RH’s New Synchrony Card Deepening Customer Loyalty Or Shifting Its Risk Profile (RH)?
feed.summary: RH (NYSE: RH) has launched a new credit card in partnership with Synchrony, integrating it into its Members Program to offer promotional financing and leveraging Synchrony's PRISM system for tailored credit offerings. While the card could modestly boost near-term sales and customer engagement, it primarily supports analysts' existing expectations for earnings growth by enhancing conversion and ticket size within the RH Members Program. The article emphasizes that this new offering does not alter the core investment risks for RH, such as its significant debt load and the ongoing need to expand margins without over-reliance on markdowns.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Shares Up 3.6% on Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) saw its shares rise 3.6% after Barclays upgraded the stock to Overweight and increased its price target to $625, citing strong demand for HDDs driven by AI and data centers. Other analysts also raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus. Despite strong earnings and revenue growth, the article notes concerns about valuation, high debt-to-equity, and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Packaging Corp. of America's 1Q Profit Down on Rising Costs
feed.summary: Packaging Corp. of America reported a decrease in its first-quarter profit, primarily due to higher operating and energy costs. Despite the profit decline, the company saw a modest increase in sales for the quarter, indicating some resilience in demand. Management expects pricing and demand to remain stable, though they anticipate continued cost challenges in the near term.

feed.title: Salesforce and Google partner on agentic cross-platform collaboration
feed.summary: Salesforce and Google Cloud have expanded their partnership to enable seamless cross-platform collaboration for AI agents. The collaboration aims to break down data silos and reduce the "hidden toggling tax" and "data gravity" issues preventing efficient productivity. Key integrations include Agentforce with Google's Gemini and BigQuery, enabling agents to operate across both ecosystems and access data without moving it.

feed.title: Today’s Market Recap: Nasdaq Hits Record High as Tech Rallies on AI Growth; Tesla Q1 Beats Estimates Amid Spending Surge
feed.summary: The Nasdaq Composite achieved a new record high, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq seeing significant gains driven by mega-cap tech stocks, Alphabet, and semiconductor companies benefiting from AI demand. Tesla's Q1 results showed strong revenue and earnings growth, though the company plans for substantial capital expenditures. Meanwhile, Google and OpenAI advanced AI with new chips and tools, while broader markets reacted to potential ceasefire talks between the U.S. and Iran and a political dispute over tariff refunds.

feed.title: Ambarella (AMBA) CFO’s pre-planned sale of 1,971 shares at $60 disclosed
feed.summary: Ambarella Inc.'s CFO, John Alexander Young, sold 1,971 Ordinary Shares at $60.00 each through a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on January 15, 2026. This transaction leaves him with 117,623 shares, representing a small fraction of his total holdings. The sale is considered routine and not a significant indicator of insider sentiment due to its pre-planned nature.

feed.title: American Air explores Alaska Air revenue-sharing deal
feed.summary: American Airlines is reportedly exploring a revenue-sharing deal with Alaska Airlines. This potential collaboration could impact both carriers' financial strategies and competitive positions within the airline industry. The news comes amid broader discussions about airline partnerships and consolidation.

feed.title: Certain Restricted Stock Units of Ambiq Micro, Inc. are subject to a Lock-Up Agreement Ending on 23-APR-2026.
feed.summary: Certain Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) of Ambiq Micro, Inc. are under a lock-up agreement that concludes on April 23, 2026. This lock-up period spans 91 days, from January 22, 2026, to April 23, 2026. Key individuals and entities, including executive officers, directors, selling stockholders, KPCB, and Matter Venture, have agreed not to dispose of common stock or convertible securities during this time without the consent of BofA Securities, Inc. and UBS Securities LLC.

feed.title: Advance Auto Parts Rose 25% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise in 2026
feed.summary: Advance Auto Parts (AAP) stock has risen 25% in the last 30 days due to signs of a turnaround, including a return to positive comparable sales and operating income. The company is focusing on margin expansion through distribution network consolidation, improved vendor pricing, and better inventory availability. Analysts and valuation models suggest significant upside potential for AAP as it narrows the performance gap with competitors like AutoZone and O’Reilly Automotive.

feed.title: Does Zscaler's (ZS) EVP Exit Reshape Its AI Security Strategy Or Reinforce Its Zero Trust Focus?
feed.summary: Zscaler's EVP of Corporate Strategy, Raj Judge, resigned in April 2026. This departure comes as Zscaler gains recognition for its AI-focused security, including a Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security, which reinforces its zero-trust and AI investment narrative. The company's future projections show significant revenue growth and profitability by 2029, though competition from larger cloud and security vendors remains a key risk.

feed.title: TransUnion CLO Heather J Russell sells $158,640 in stock
feed.summary: Heather J Russell, TransUnion's CLO, sold 1,983 shares of company stock for $158,640 at $80 per share, leaving her with 39,080 shares. This transaction occurred on April 21, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sale comes as TransUnion's stock trades below the transaction price, with InvestingPro indicating the stock is undervalued.

feed.title: Exicure Announces Co-Development Agreement with Adbiotech for Burixafor (GPC-100)
feed.summary: Exicure, Inc. announced a co-development agreement with Adbiotech Co., Ltd. to explore combination therapies using Burixafor (GPC-100). The collaboration will focus on evaluating Burixafor in indications such as sickle cell disease, acute myeloid leukemia, and solid tumors, building on its successful Phase 2 clinical trial in multiple myeloma. Adbiotech will handle in-vivo studies and preclinical validation, while Exicure will provide Burixafor and lead clinical/regulatory strategy.

feed.title: MPC Price History for Marathon Petroleum Corp Stock
feed.summary: The article provides a comprehensive price history for Marathon Petroleum Corp (MPC) stock on Barchart.com. It details various data points including daily prices, trade logs, corporate actions, and key 52-week performance metrics like highs, lows, and Fibonacci levels. The page also offers extensive tools for members to download historical data and analyze price movements.

feed.title: Regeneron, Sanofi: FDA approves Dupixent for treatment of CSU in ages 2-11
feed.summary: The U.S. FDA has approved Dupixent, co-developed by Regeneron and Sanofi, for the treatment of chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) in children aged 2 to 11. This approval expands the drug's use, previously sanctioned for adults and adolescents 12 and older with CSU, specifically for those who remain symptomatic despite antihistamine treatment.

feed.title: 'Canny Pack' unveiled, Coca-Cola reveals bag for soda cans
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has announced "The Canny Pack," a fanny pack designed to hold Diet Coke cans, in collaboration with "The Devil Wears Prada 2" movie. Crafted from top-grain leather and silver in color, the limited-edition accessory will not be sold but displayed at Saks Fifth Avenue and given away through influencer Kristen Hollingshaus. The initiative merges fashion with pop culture and highlights Diet Coke's brand identity.

feed.title: 'Canny Pack' unveiled, Coca-Cola reveals bag for soda cans
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has announced "The Canny Pack," a fanny pack designed to hold Diet Coke cans, in collaboration with "The Devil Wears Prada 2" movie. Made from top-grain leather and silver in color, the limited-edition bag will not be sold but will be displayed at Saks Fifth Avenue and distributed through "surprise and delight gifting" by an influencer. The initiative aims to align Diet Coke with fashion and culture.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Balances Margin Pressure With Strong Service
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide's Q1 2026 earnings call revealed robust service growth and a strong modernization backlog, largely driven by demand for existing elevator maintenance and upgrades, particularly in the Americas. While facing margin pressure and softness in new equipment sales, especially from China, the company maintained its full-year sales outlook and upgraded its profit range, expecting a rebound in the second half of 2026. Strategic investments in digital capabilities and new product introductions, coupled with strong cash generation and capital returns, underscore confidence in long-term growth despite near-term headwinds.

feed.title: Starbucks Hunts for Another Tech Office, Including Abroad
feed.summary: Starbucks is actively seeking a new location for its technology division, contemplating both domestic and international cities, to further reduce tech-related expenses. This initiative follows the company's recent announcement of a new office in Nashville and a reported $100 million in tech spending cuts over the last three months, as disclosed by CTO Anand Varadarajan. The move aims to optimize operational costs for the coffee chain.

feed.title: Slide insurance CEO Lucas sells $2.3m in SLDE shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Bruce Lucas, CEO of Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:SLDE), sold 118,055 shares for approximately $2.3 million through a pre-arranged trading plan. This sale occurred on April 20, 2026, with shares sold at a weighted average price of $19.55. Despite the sale, the company's stock has performed well, gaining nearly 21% in the last six months, and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis.
